title: Fun run/walk: Bring Ouma and Oupa along
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  Groenkloof Wellness and Aquatic Centre is holding a fun run/walk on Saturday 16 March that promises to be loads of fun.

It is for the whole family and everyone is encouraged to bring their grannies along.


> It will take place at the Groenkloof retirement estate and participants may choose from a 1km, 3km or 5km distance.


Entrants may participate with the assistance of a friend or caretaker.

The entry fee is R60 per person and includes a medal and free coffee for each participant who finishes.

The event starts at 09:00.

Children under 12 enter for free. Pets are welcome.

Pre-entries are available at the Wellness and Aquatic Centre. Phone 044 810 0844 for more information.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
